title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: Pixel Diffusion (PiD) by Nvidia is an open-source AI model for generating high-resolution 4K images. The video demonstrates its capabilities, installation, and usage within ComfyUI workflows, comparing it to alternatives like SeedVR2.
